narrative:
Union Twp township has 652 registered voters, with 51.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.6 percentage points.
